function.outcome_justification: Inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR of all bills related to Juniper. Three related bill records were identified and each was read and updated with schema-required bill frontmatter (record_type, bill_id, alias, purchased_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, lines, optional related_entity) extracted from visible note content. After all three updates, the inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
